creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just hit this too on ifconfig wlan0 down:

load: 0.73  cmd: ifconfig 1699 [tq_drain] 226.61r 0.00u 0.00s 0% 3204k
mi_switch+0x172 sleepq_switch+0x109 _sleep+0x2a5 taskqueue_drain+0xf8 ieee80211_waitfor_parent+0x28 ieee80211_ioctl+0x377 ifhwioctl+0xd0b ifioctl+0x938 kern_ioctl+0x286 sys_ioctl+0x12f amd64_syscall+0x15a fast_syscall_common+0xf8
